title: Mini simulator
description: A 5-minute free flight to practice what you learned: take off, climb, turn and land.

briefing.title: Ready for takeoff?
briefing.body: Apply full throttle to accelerate down the runway. Above 20 m/s, pull gently (S) to lift the nose. Keep your speed up — if you fly too slowly, the wing will stall.

stallWarning: STALL — lower the nose and add power

timeUp.title: Flight session complete
timeUp.body: Your 5 minutes are up. Review a theory module or start a new flight.

crash.title: Rough landing!
crash.body: You hit the ground too hard or too banked. Level the wings and descend gently before touching down.
